name: Rokoko
description: Motion-capture tooling with Smartsuit Pro hardware, AI video capture and Rokoko Studio for exporting to Unity, Unreal and Blender.

seo.title: Rokoko — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Rokoko: Motion-capture tooling with Smartsuit Pro hardware, AI video capture and Rokoko Studio for exporting to Unity, Unreal and Blender.

when_to_use: Capturing motion data for game character animation via smart suit
Streaming real-time mocap data to Unity or Unreal via plugin
Producing animation assets for film and games at lower cost
Building AI-powered motion retargeting for 3D character rigs

pros: Affordable mocap versus Vicon and OptiTrack
AI video capture removes need for suits
Studio exports to Unity, Unreal, Blender
cons: Lower precision than pro optical systems
AI video capture still trails suit accuracy
Hardware cost still significant for indies
review.verdict: Best-value mocap for indie studios and small teams; big-budget productions still need optical systems.
review.best_for: Indie game and animation studios needing affordable mocap
review.not_for: AAA studios demanding sub-millimeter optical precision
